entries.summary: All 6 Phase 5 tasks ALIGNED with spec: 5.1 Transformers.js embeddings match FR-013 (OPFS caching) and FR-003 (offline-first), 5.2 EdgeVec HNSW matches FR-017 (hybrid retrieval semantic component), 5.3 FlexSearch keyword matches FR-017 (hybrid retrieval keyword component), 5.4 RRF fusion matches FR-017 (ranked fusion algorithm), 5.5 Cross-encoder reranker matches FR-017 (retrieval quality) with FR-014 (memory-aware conditional activation), 5.6 Memory-aware selection matches FR-014 and US-03 (memory pressure detection). No drift detected.
